fields.helpText: This field contains the internal entry number of the MHV SOCIALIZATIONS  ACTIONS record.
This field contains an abbreviated description of the action taken by the  clerk to facilitate the patient's registration in My HealtheVet.
This multiple contains the list of Action prompt locations in which this  specific action may be displayed and selected.
This word processing field contains an expanded description of the action  taken by the clerk to facilitate the patient's registration in My  HealtheVet.
